---
title: "02b_project_management"
subtitle: "Introduction"
author: "Lennart Wittkuhn, Christoph Koch, Ondrej Zika"
institute: "Max Planck Research Group NeuroCode"
date: "2016/12/12 (updated: `r Sys.Date()`)"
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    self_contained: true
    yolo: false
    lib_dir: libs
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
---
class: middle

## Using `git` and Gitlab for project management

---

### Content

- Using `git` issues
- Documentation and wiki
- Permissions and roles

---

### Permissions and roles

- Each `remote` repository can have multiple members
